Description
global.thalion.ttio
 
global.thalion.ttio.providers
Storage/transport provider abstraction — Milestone 39.

    Method
    Description
    static AcquisitionRun
    AcquisitionRun.readFrom(StorageGroup parentGroup, String runName)
    Read a run from an existing storage group.

    Read an image cube from a storage file.

    Read a Raman image cube from a study group, or null if absent.

    SpectrumIndex.readFrom(StorageGroup runGroup)
    Read spectrum index from an existing run group.
    void
    AcquisitionRun.writeTo(StorageGroup parentGroup)

    Write feature flags to any provider's root group (v0.9).

    void
    MSImage.writeTo(StorageGroup studyGroup)
    Write this image cube to a storage study group.
    void
    RamanImage.writeTo(StorageGroup studyGroup)
    Write this image cube as an HDF5 sub-group of studyGroup.
    void
    SpectrumIndex.writeTo(StorageGroup runGroup)
    Write this index to a storage group (creates spectrum_index/ subgroup).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static StorageGroup
    Hdf5Provider.adapterForGroup(Hdf5Group group)
    v0.7 M44: wrap a raw Hdf5Group in the provider adapter so callers holding the low-level handle (AcquisitionRun, SpectralDataset) can hand it off as a protocol StorageGroup.
